title: webhook does not deliver "element name"

posts.author: JLeutgeb (Johannes)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I am building the Zap “create new folder (in Google Drive) when Item is moved to group”.
Works fine despite I can not add a dynamic name which should be read out the monday items “element name”.
The preset webhook does not deliver the element name. It delivers a bunch of data like time or group name, but not any specific out the that item.

How do I get that “Element name” to name the to-be-created Google driver folder?
